Rythmos® Smoke Alarm

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Smoke detection
85 dB alarm
10-year battery

Overview

Rythmos® Smoke Alarm is a battery-powered optical smoke detector designed to identify smoldering fires and provide early warning through audible alerts and system notifications.

FUNCTIONS

Detects smoke using optical (photoelectric) sensing
Triggers audible alarm and system alert
Transmits events to central monitoring system
Monitors device status and battery health

Key Capabilities

Optical
Detection

Sensitive
to smoldering fires

Audible
Alarm

85
dB onboard sounder

10-Year
Battery

Sealed
long-life power

Wireless
Interconnect

Multiple
alarms triggered simultaneously

Test
/ Hush Button

Easy
control and maintenance

Environmental
Sensing

Temperature,
humidity, air quality

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 115 × 50 mm
Sensor Type: Optical (photoelectric)
Power Source: 3V lithium battery (sealed)
Battery Life: Up to 10 years
Sound Level: 85 dB(A) at 3 m
Wireless: 2.4 GHz / RF interconnect
Temperature Range: 0°C to 40°C
Humidity: 15%–95% RH
Firmware Updates: OTA

System Topology — Smoke Alarm Deployment

Install the device in hallways, bedrooms, and common areas to ensure comprehensive coverage across the facility. Placement should prioritize escape routes to support early detection in critical pathways. For full-area protection, multiple interconnected units should be used to provide consistent and reliable coverage throughout the space.

Installation Guidelines

Coverage

- Install on every floor
- Place near sleeping areas and escape paths

Placement

- Ceiling mounted (center of room)
- Minimum 300 mm from walls

Mounting

- Twist-on base installation
- Screw-mounted plate included

Power

- Sealed battery (no replacement)
- Activated on installation

Avoid

- Kitchens, bathrooms, high steam areas
- Air vents, direct sunlight, dust

intrexis.com
